name: Ligmincha International
description: Ligmincha International is an organization dedicated to preserving the ancient Bön Buddhist tradition of Tibet. Founded by Tenzin Wangyal Rinpoche, it offers retreats, online courses, and practice groups worldwide. The Ligmincha center in Charlottesville, Virginia, serves as the US headquarters. Teachings focus on Bön Dzogchen meditation, dream yoga, and the five elements.
